problem: Traditional ECG analysis relies on pattern recognition by clinicians, which can miss subtle indicators of underlying cardiac conditions like cardiomyopathy. There is a need for AI-powered ECG analysis that can predict cardiac disease from standard ECG recordings.
solution: HeartSciences develops AI-powered electrocardiography (AI-ECG) solutions using deep learning algorithms to analyze standard ECG recordings. Their technology can predict cardiomyopathy in patients with premature ventricular complexes (PVCs) and identify other cardiac conditions that may be missed by traditional analysis. The platform leverages ECG-based deep learning to provide earlier detection of cardiac disease.
